ordered_steps.name: Load eligible distilled units and blocker records
Create page, state, overlay, processing, failure, success, external, and terminal nodes
Create clickable inventory from eligible actions and affordances
Create reaction records for each clickable
Create graph edges and align them to reactions and targets
Bind async, handoff, failure recovery, and overlay closure slices
ordered_steps.required_output: async, handoff, failure, and overlay artifacts

ordered_steps.name: Bind user-visible messages and message coverage index
Run full graph closure and split-artifact drift checks
Create handoff for page element model with eligible and blocked graph units

closure_rules: Every clickable must have exactly one reaction record.
Every reaction target must resolve to a graph node, terminal target, or reviewed external handoff.
Every non-terminal node must have a continuation edge or trap justification.
Every non-immediate reaction must have async behavior and message coverage.
Every failure-prone reaction must have failure behavior, failure node, recovery target, and message coverage.
Every overlay must have closure targets and return context.
Split artifacts must exactly match the graph payload for their object family.
No edge, reaction, or message may introduce unapproved product capability.
forbidden_behaviors: consume unresolved distillation product expansion gaps as eligible graph units
create a clickable without a reaction
create an async reaction without duplicate-trigger and timeout behavior
create a failure node without recovery targets or terminal explanation
write product-scope expansion into user-visible copy
